description: Golden set of mock Workers AI outputs for extractThemes. `accept` entries must parse into themes; `reject` entries must raise InsightsValidationError. `output` is the raw model response string.

accept.name: clean_json
accept.output: {"themes":[{"theme":"Team velocity","count":7,"examples":["We ship weekly."]},{"theme":"Communication","count":4,"examples":["Standups help a lot."]},{"theme":"Tooling","count":3,"examples":["CI is slow."]}]}

accept.name: prose_wrapped_json
accept.output: Here are the themes you asked for: {"themes":[{"theme":"Onboarding","count":2,"examples":["Docs were helpful."]},{"theme":"Pairing","count":2,"examples":["Loved the pairing day."]}]} Hope this helps!

reject.name: theme_label_too_long
reject.output: {"themes":[{"theme":"This theme label is way too long to be allowed by the schema which caps at sixty characters","count":1,"examples":[]}]}

reject.name: refusal_prose_no_json
reject.output: I cannot summarise these responses because they contain instructions I must not follow.
